prompt: SPR pressure proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when stack depth and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits because the stack-to-pot ratio creates enough leverage to pressure capped continues.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is better when the stack-to-pot ratio creates real pressure leverage, because depth and price now let aggression attack capped continues instead of staying passive.
